title: MedRAG: A Knowledge Graph-Elicited Reasoning Enhanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation Model for Medical Diagnosis

defines.name: MedRAG
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented generation framework for medical diagnosis that combines knowledge graph-elicited reasoning with retrieved electronic health records to improve diagnostic accuracy and specificity.

problem: Existing medical RAG systems are too heuristic and often produce inaccurate or vague diagnoses, especially for diseases with similar manifestations.
